senior_junior_culture.summary: Admissions megathreads show seniors and alumni answering practical questions, but public evidence is too limited to generalise about all batches, club hierarchies or mentoring. No campus-wide ragging claim is made.
positive_themes: peer guidance on admissions and placements
negative_themes: insufficient evidence on club hierarchy and fresher inclusion

academic_culture.summary: Official sources describe a fast, practice-theory-practice curriculum, early projects, research opportunities and industry-oriented CSE/ECE tracks. Student discussions broadly support an academically focused environment, while workload, grading strictness and faculty accessibility receive mixed or incomplete evidence.
negative_themes: public evidence on grading and attendance is incomplete

hostel_reality.summary: The official 2026 profile states IIIT Sri City is residential and on-campus stay is compulsory, with two boys hostels and one girls hostel functional and additional construction underway. Student reports generally recognise newer infrastructure but differ on room/building quality and earlier arrangements; current allocation and occupancy should be confirmed.
negative_themes: older hostel blocks receive mixed comments
mess and room quality evidence is inconsistent

club_and_campus_life.summary: The official profile lists fourteen technical, cultural and social clubs plus national outreach programmes, and current institute pages show active technical clubs and an entrepreneurship ecosystem. Student sources acknowledge activities but often describe limited outside-city life.
negative_themes: industrial-town setting limits spontaneous city life
activity levels vary and some clubs lack dated public updates

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official sources show programming from the first year, a full-stack track, competitive programming, internships and semester-long industry projects. Student discussions repeatedly regard coding and placements as strengths, while debating eligibility denominators and whether headline statistics represent the full batch. Official registered-cohort data is retained as the factual record.
negative_themes: placement denominator is registered students rather than total intake

locality_and_student_life.summary: The campus is inside the Sri City industrial ecosystem, close to Tada but roughly 60-80 km from major Chennai/Tirupati hubs. Official transport information is detailed, while student sources repeatedly describe limited outside life. The industrial ecosystem may support exposure, but daily city access requires planning.
negative_themes: limited city nightlife and local market variety

overall_satisfaction.summary: IIIT Sri City appears best suited to students prioritising CSE/AI/ECE curricula, coding, research, placements and a residential technical environment. Students seeking low fees, a broad branch portfolio, mature metropolitan college life or a guaranteed relaxed workload should evaluate the trade-offs carefully.
negative_themes: placement and hostel scopes require careful reading
